targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT contributions_total FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest)),0) AS value

targets.queryText: SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date AS value FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date AS value FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, contributions_total AS Contributions, withdrawals_total AS Withdrawals, dividends_total_received AS Dividends FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, contributions_total AS Contributions, withdrawals_total AS Withdrawals, dividends_total_received AS Dividends FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, trades_total_count AS Trades, margin_net_change AS MarginNet FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, trades_total_count AS Trades, margin_net_change AS MarginNet FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), c AS (SELECT contribution_date AS Dt, 'contrib' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, '' AS Note, 'contribution' AS Src FROM period_contributions WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY contribution_date DESC LIMIT 2), w AS (SELECT withdrawal_date AS Dt, 'withdraw' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, '' AS Note, 'withdrawal' AS Src FROM period_withdrawals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY withdrawal_date DESC LIMIT 2), t AS (SELECT (SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AS Dt, substr(symbol,1,8) AS Item, (buy_count + sell_count) AS AmtSigned, ('b' || buy_count || '/s' || sell_count) AS Note, 'trade' AS Src FROM period_trades WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY (buy_count + sell_count) DESC LIMIT 1), p AS (SELECT (SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AS Dt, substr(list_type,1,10) AS Item, COUNT(*) AS AmtSigned, substr(group_concat(substr(symbol,1,4),','),1,18) AS Note, 'positions' AS Src FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) GROUP BY list_type LIMIT 1) SELECT Dt, Item, AmtSigned, Note, Src, 'MONTH' AS PType FROM (SELECT * FROM c UNION ALL SELECT * FROM w UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t UNION ALL SELECT * FROM p) ORDER BY Dt DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), c AS (SELECT contribution_date AS Dt, 'contrib' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, '' AS Note, 'contribution' AS Src FROM period_contributions WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY contribution_date DESC LIMIT 2), w AS (SELECT withdrawal_date AS Dt, 'withdraw' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, '' AS Note, 'withdrawal' AS Src FROM period_withdrawals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY withdrawal_date DESC LIMIT 2), t AS (SELECT (SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AS Dt, substr(symbol,1,8) AS Item, (buy_count + sell_count) AS AmtSigned, ('b' || buy_count || '/s' || sell_count) AS Note, 'trade' AS Src FROM period_trades WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY (buy_count + sell_count) DESC LIMIT 1), p AS (SELECT (SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AS Dt, substr(list_type,1,10) AS Item, COUNT(*) AS AmtSigned, substr(group_concat(substr(symbol,1,4),','),1,18) AS Note, 'positions' AS Src FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) GROUP BY list_type LIMIT 1) SELECT Dt, Item, AmtSigned, Note, Src, 'MONTH' AS PType FROM (SELECT * FROM c UNION ALL SELECT * FROM w UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t UNION ALL SELECT * FROM p) ORDER BY Dt DESC LIMIT 5
